---
title: "clutch-modeling"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

```

```{r}
model_data <- read.csv('/cloud/project/data/processed-data/combined_player_shot_chart_2023.csv') %>% 
  select('player', 'qtr', 'time_remaining',
         'result', 'distance_ft', 'lead',
         'player_team_score', 'opponent_team_score') %>% 
  mutate('sec_remaining' = as.numeric(ms(time_remaining), 'seconds')) %>%
  mutate('margin' = abs(player_team_score - opponent_team_score),
         result_binary = ifelse(model_data$result == 'TRUE', 1, 0),
         lead_binary = ifelse(model_data$lead == 'TRUE', 1, 0),
         is_clutch = ifelse(
           qtr %in% c('4th Qtr', '1st OT', '2nd OT') &
             sec_remaining <= 120 &
             margin <= 5,
           1, 0)
         )

```
